title: Saving wisely: planned expenses
description: Practice calculating the amount needed for savings when dealing with planned expenses.

assessment_items.question_content:
Alicia's HOA dues are $\$720$ per year. She wants to save the same amount of money each month to pay her dues at the end of the year.

**How much money will Alicia need to save each month?**

$\$$[[☃ numeric-input 2]] per month
hints: To find how much money Alicia needs to save each month, we need to divide the cost of the annual dues by the number of months in a year.
$\$720\div12\text{ months}=\$60$
Alicia needs to save $\$60$ each month.

assessment_items.question_content:
Dimitri's car insurance costs $\$1{,}200$ per year. He pays it in one lump sum every January. He has $12$ months until his next payment. This year, he wants to start setting aside equal amounts every month to save for the bill.   

**How much money will Dimitri need to save each month?**

$\$$[[☃ numeric-input 1]] per month
hints: To find how much money Dimitri needs to save each month, we need to divide the cost of the insurance by the number of months in a year.
Dimitri needs to save $\$100$ per month.

assessment_items.question_content:
Carla wants to make sure she's able to afford her yearly gym membership, which costs $\$480$. She wants to set aside equal monthly amounts so she will have the full amount ready when it's time to renew. She has $12$ months until her next payment is due.

**How much money will Carla need to save each month?**

$\$$[[☃ numeric-input 1]] per month
hints: To find how much money Carla needs to save each month, we need to divide the cost of the annual membership by the number of months in a year.
$\$480 \div 12 \text{ months}= \$40$
Carla needs to save $\$40$ per month.

assessment_items.question_content:
Yahir is trying to budget for his movie subscription renewal, which costs $\$144$. He wants to set aside equal monthly amounts so he will have the full amount ready when it's time to renew. He has $12$ months until his next payment is due.

**How much money will Yahir need to save each month?**

$\$$[[☃ numeric-input 1]] per month
hints: To find how much money Yahir needs to save each month, we need to divide the cost of the annual subscription by the number of months in a year.
$\$144 \div 12 \text{ months} = \$12$
Yahir needs to save $\$12$ each month.

assessment_items.question_content:
Jon's water heater is old and will need replacement in the future. A new water heater costs $\$900$. Jon would like to replace it in a year, but wants to start saving for it now. He plans on saving equal amounts every month.

**How much money will Jon need to save each month?**

$\$$[[☃ numeric-input 1]] per month
hints: To find how much money Jon needs to save each month, we need to divide the cost of the water heater by the number of months in a year.
$\$900 \div 12 \text{ months}= \$75$
Jon needs to save $\$75$ each month.

assessment_items.question_content:
Randy's wife always looks at countertop mixers but has never bought one. For their next anniversary, he would like to surprise her with one. The mixer she likes was $\$132$. Randy plans on putting aside the same amount of money every month to make it more affordable. He has one year until their next anniversary.

**How much money will Randy need to save each month?**

$\$$[[☃ numeric-input 1]] per month
hints: To find how much money Randy needs to save each month, we need to divide by the cost of the mixer by the number of months in a year.
$\$132 \div 12 \text{ months} = \$11$
Randy needs to save $\$11$ each month.

assessment_items.question_content:
Brian pays $\$600$ every six months for his car insurance. He just paid his bill for this year, but wants to budget for his next payment and save an equal amount each month. He has $5$ months until his insurance is due again.   

**How much money will Brian need to save each month?**

$\$$[[☃ numeric-input 1]] per month
hints: To find how much money Brian needs to save each month, we need to divide the cost of the car insurance by the number of months he has left to save.
$\$600\div5\text{ months} = \$120$
Brian needs to save $\$120$ each month.

assessment_items.question_content:
Samir's gym membership is $\$300$ a year. He recently renewed his membership, but wants to budget for his next renewal. He plans on saving equal amounts each month. He has $10$ months until his membership is due again.  

**How much money will Samir need to save each month?**  

$\$$[[☃ numeric-input 1]] per month
hints: To find how much money Samir needs to save each month, we need to divide the cost of the gym membership by the number of months he has left to save.
$\$300 \div 10 \text{ months}= \$30$
Samir will need to save $\$30$ each month.

assessment_items.question_content:
Alma wants to budget for her upcoming renter's insurance renewal, which will cost $\$250$. To do this, she plans to save equal amounts each month for the next $5$ months.

**How much will Alma need to save each month?**

$\$$[[☃ numeric-input 1]] per month
hints: To find how much money Alma needs to save each month, we need to divide the cost of the rental insurance by the number of months she has left to save.
$\$250 \div 5 \text{ months} = \$50$
Alma needs to save $\$50$ each month.

assessment_items.question_content:
Ana's parents' anniversary is coming up in $9$ months. She plans on surprising them with a new patio set that costs  $\$279$. She would like to start saving for it now, and put aside an equal amount every month.

**How much does Ana need to save each month?**

$\$$[[☃ numeric-input 1]] per month
hints: To find how much money Ana needs to save each month, we need to divide the cost of the patio set by the number of months she has left to save.
$\$279 \div 9 \text{ months}= \$31$
Ana needs to save $\$31$ each month.

assessment_items.question_content:
Nayeli is saving for a new laptop that costs  $\$688$ and is giving herself $8$ months to save up for it. She would like to put aside the same amount every month. 

**How much does Nayeli need to save each month?**

$\$$[[☃ numeric-input 1]] per month
hints: To find how much money Nayeli needs to save each month, we need to divide the cost of the laptop by the number of months she plans to save.
$\$688 \div 8 \text{ months} = \$86$
Nayeli needs to save $\$86$ each month.

assessment_items.question_content:
At his recent car inspection, Nik was told that his tires are getting worn and should be replaced in the near future. A set of new tires for Nik's car cost  $\$552$ and Nik plans on saving equal amounts each month for six months. 
 
**How much does Nik need to save each month?**

$\$$[[☃ numeric-input 1]] per month
hints: To find how much money Nik needs to save each month, we need to divide the cost of the tires by the number of months he has left to save.
$\$552 \div 6 \text{ months} = \$92$
Nik needs to save $\$92$ each month.
